Name: LU 66 - Zoning, Chalong, Manhattan (D 2650129760 SWM).
Title: Resolution approving with modifications a petition for a revocable consent for a sidewalk café located at 749 Ninth Avenue, Borough of Manhattan (Non-ULURP No. D 2650129760 SWM; DOT No. 20250918010001; L.U. No. 66).
